docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROSENBERG-WOHL, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SEVEN CORNERS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SEVEN CORNERS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-29-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE MET. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DIMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF DAVID ROSENBERG-WOHL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEVEN CORNERS, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUL-21-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEVEN CORNERS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE NOT PRESENT. PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, CASE TO BE DISMISSED IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE 1/29/18 HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
